creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
Yes, no new shadow copy modules have been recently added:

% pkg info -l samba419-4.19.7| fgrep shadow
        /usr/local/lib/samba4/modules/vfs/shadow_copy.so
        /usr/local/lib/samba4/modules/vfs/shadow_copy2.so
        /usr/local/share/man/man8/vfs_shadow_copy.8.gz
        /usr/local/share/man/man8/vfs_shadow_copy2.8.gz
